headlines.title: Energy Crisis Is Changing Demand Patterns—For Now
headlines.summary: Roughly one-fifth of global LNG flows has been impacted by the Hormuz crisis. The cumulative losses in crude oil supply have topped 1 billion barrels since the start of March. headlines.title: Americans Rethink Driving as Fuel Costs Keep Climbing
headlines.summary: Americans are commuting on the bus and train more and even turning toy cars into two-gallon cars to use for supermarket runs as the highest gasoline prices in four years are changing consumer behavior. headlines.summary: Five years ago, over 40 countries pledged to scale back and phase down unabated coal power at the COP26 UN Climate Summit by 2030-2040, with hundreds of institutions promising to end international coal financing. headlines.title: This New Solar Battery Stores Energy Without Lithium or the Grid
headlines.summary: The challenge of solar-powered energy has always been the means to store it. And the intermittency of solar and wind energy makes that storage capability essential.
